Meta.Description: PATTERN TEMPLATE — Illustrates a comprehensive Linux SSH platform covering password, SSH key, discovery, and enable/disable operations. Adapt to your target.

Condition.If: Regex.IsMatch(CmdResponse, @"(is not in the sudoers file)|(SUDO password for )|(incorrect password attempts)|(Sorry, try again)|(ejected)|(may not run sudo)|(is not allowed to run sudo)|(is not in the sudoers file)|(is not allowed to execute)|(Request rejected)|(Permission denied)")

Cases.CaseValue: (incorrect password attempts)|(Sorry, try again)|(Check for other error messages here)
(incorrect password attempts)|(Sorry, try again)|(Check for other error messages here)
(CHGPASS=[1-9]+.*)|(BAD PASSWORD)|(Have exhausted maximum number of retries)
(incorrect password attempts)|(Sorry, try again)|(Check for other error messages here)
(Only root can specify a user name)|(Permission denied)|(may not view or modify password information)
(BAD PASSWORD)|(Have exhausted maximum number of retries)

SetItem.Name: GetDiscoverDataSendBuffer
SetItem.Value: %DelegationPrefix::$% grep '^[^:#]' %Pwdfile% | cut -d ':' -f1,3 | tr -s ':' ' ' | while read user uid; do printf "uid="${uid}"("${user}") "; %Idcmd% "${user}" | %Awkcmd% '{if (length($3)==0) { gp=$2; gsub(/gid=/, "", $2); print(gp, "groups=" $2) } else {print $2, $3}}'; done | grep '^uid=[0-9][0-9]*.*$'

Function.Name: RunCmd
Parameters: %DelegationPrefix% mkdir -p '%AccountHome%/.ssh' && %DelegationPrefix% touch '%AuthorizedKeysPath%' && %DelegationPrefix% chown %AccountUid%:%AccountGid% '%AccountHome%/.ssh' '%AuthorizedKeysPath%' && %DelegationPrefix% chmod 700 '%AccountHome%/.ssh' && %DelegationPrefix% chmod 600 '%AuthorizedKeysPath%'; echo "AUTHFILE=$?"

Function.Name: RunCmd
Parameters: /bin/sh -lc "if [ -f '%AuthorizedKeysPath%' ]; then echo '%{ EncodedKey }%' | base64 -d | %DelegationPrefix% grep -F -x -f - '%AuthorizedKeysPath%' >/dev/null; echo KEYCHECK=$?; else echo KEYCHECK=1; fi"

Function.Name: RunCmd
Parameters: echo '%{ EncodedNewKey }%' | base64 -d | %DelegationPrefix% tee -a '%AuthorizedKeysPath%' >/dev/null && %DelegationPrefix% chown %AccountUid%:%AccountGid% '%AuthorizedKeysPath%' && %DelegationPrefix% chmod 600 '%AuthorizedKeysPath%'; echo "ADDKEY=$?"

Function.Name: RunCmd
Parameters: /bin/sh -lc "tmp='%AuthorizedKeysPath%.tmp'; echo '%{ EncodedOldKey }%' | base64 -d | %DelegationPrefix% grep -F -x -v -f - '%AuthorizedKeysPath%' > \"$tmp\" || true; %DelegationPrefix% mv \"$tmp\" '%AuthorizedKeysPath%'; %DelegationPrefix% chown %AccountUid%:%AccountGid% '%AuthorizedKeysPath%'; %DelegationPrefix% chmod 600 '%AuthorizedKeysPath%'; echo REMOVEKEY=$?"

SetItem.Name: AccountModeCommand
SetItem.Value: %{ Enabled ? $"{DelegationPrefix} usermod -U {AccountUserName}; echo ACCOUNTMODE=$?" : $"{DelegationPrefix} usermod -L {AccountUserName}; echo ACCOUNTMODE=$?" }%
